title: oldenlandia crystallina
intro: Oldenlandia crystallina, also known as Crystal Stem or Clear Stem, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia crystallina include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
